name: Lemon Pasta Salad with Peppercorn-Coconut Gla
recipeIngredient: 1 tsp Coarse Black Pepper, Preferably Tellicherry
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the Udon Noodles in a large amount of boiling salted water according to package directions until tender but still firm to the bite. Drain.
2. Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a large nonstick skillet or wok. Add lemon juice, zest, pepper, vegetable stock, and coconut and bring to a boil. Cook over moderately high heat for 2 minutes. Add the snow peas and continue to cook for about 1 minute. Remove from heat.
3. Add the drained noodles and stir to blend ingredients. Season with salt. When the salad has cooled to room temperature, add the herbs and stir to mix.
4. Cover and refrigerate up to 4 hours before serving. Drizzle with the remaining olive oil and serve garnished with cilantro sprigs.
